narrative:
Warren County has 175,382 registered voters, with 52.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.4 percentage points. Gen X are the largest generational cohort at 27.8% of registrants.
